departments.name: Street Wire
departments.blurb: Real-time updates on street sessions, local skate spots, slams, and trick logs.
departments.ethics_gate: Verify spot permissions and safety disclosures.

departments.name: Deck Check
departments.blurb: Teardowns and deep reviews of board builds, setup specs, and street hardware.
departments.ethics_gate: Unbiased technical testing and transparent manufacturer disclosures.

departments.name: Rust & Boost
departments.blurb: Deep-dives into car culture, engine builds, suspension logs, and D16 tuning runs.
departments.ethics_gate: Respect local traffic regulations; document safety checks.

departments.name: Sacred Static
departments.blurb: Street art, sacred murals, and traditional neighborhood iconography.
departments.ethics_gate: Handle religious and Chicano iconographic traditions with respect; do not commercialize sacred elements.

departments.name: Slop Feed
departments.blurb: Curation of internet culture trends, memes, and daily unhinged commentary.
departments.ethics_gate: Verify context of content; protect private user accounts from exposure.

departments.name: Night Market
departments.blurb: Exploring late-night eats, taco stand recipes, and corner-store food science.
departments.ethics_gate: Support and promote local vendors; pay full price for food; highlight hygiene and safety.

departments.name: Ink Ledger
departments.blurb: Weekly digests on regional graffiti styles, handstyles, throwups, and color tracks.
departments.ethics_gate: Provide pure stylistic documentation; do not publish identifiers or sensitive location data.

departments.name: Doom Scroll
departments.blurb: Fact-checking claims and exposing algorithm manipulation metrics.
departments.ethics_gate: Multi-source fact verification; issue corrections immediately upon error.

departments.name: Crypt Merch
departments.blurb: Tracking storefront designs, physical merch drops, and transparent production rates.
departments.ethics_gate: Fair supply chain transparency and carbon-offset reports.

departments.name: Low Frequency
departments.blurb: Spotlighting underground music releases, vinyl finds, and bass culture.
departments.ethics_gate: Link to artists directly; respect copyright clearances and fair usage rules.

departments.name: Code Gremlin
departments.blurb: Automating repositories, metadata generation, and pipeline status maps.
departments.ethics_gate: Ensure open-source licensing; protect system access credentials.

departments.name: Saint Circuit
departments.blurb: Lore drops connecting tech concepts with community heritage and neighborhood history.
departments.ethics_gate: Maintain historical accuracy and cultural sensitivity.

departments.name: Field Static
departments.blurb: Dispatch from the neighborhood; stories of local resilience, organizing, and history.
departments.ethics_gate: Gain active consent from speakers; center community voices.
